missingLinkHeadline: We Provide the "Missing Link" to Enable Onsite Commissions for UGC
comparisonHeadline: An Onsite Commission Program is the Most Efficient and Effective Way to Scale UGC
bottomStatement2: Creators receive passive income for content already created.

steps.desc: — syndicate creator video across PDPs and checkout effortlessly
